briefTitle: Example Trial for Breast Cancer Treatment Study
officialTitle: A Phase 3 Randomized Study of Example Treatment in Breast Cancer
canJoin: **Age**: you must be between 18 and 75 years old
**Diagnosis**: you have been diagnosed with breast cancer
**Health**: your overall health is good enough to handle treatment
cannotJoin: **Prior treatment**: you have already received this type of treatment
**Other conditions**: you have severe heart or liver problems
plainSummary: This trial is testing a new drug for breast cancer to see if it works better than the current standard treatment. Participants will be randomly assigned to receive either the new drug or the standard treatment.

officialTitle: A Phase 2 Study of Novel Medication for Type 2 Diabetes
canJoin: **Current treatment**: your diabetes is not well controlled with your current medication
cannotJoin: **Kidney problems**: you have severe kidney disease
**Pregnancy**: you are pregnant or planning to become pregnant
plainSummary: This trial is testing a new medication that may help control blood sugar levels in people with type 2 diabetes who haven't responded well to existing treatments.
